hooks.prompt: Before finishing, you MUST go through every completion gate in `.agents/rules/completion-gates.md` and verify each one that applies. Use the platform-appropriate script variants (.bat on Windows cmd, .sh on Unix/bash). If any gate fails, fix the issue and re-run until clean. Do not complete until all applicable gates pass.
If this is a git command, verify the intent matches the action and the arguments are correct before proceeding.
Check if any learnings in auto-memory should be saved to docs_dev/ files. Compare MEMORY.md against docs_dev/ and offer to update if anything is out of sync.
Run the tests you wrote using the test bat with -f to filter to your new tests. Fix any failures before finishing.
Run the tests you wrote using the test bat with -f to filter to your new tests. Fix any failures before finishing.

Before finishing your review, run the format script (with `--check`) and the lint script (with `all` argument) using the platform-appropriate variant (.bat on Windows cmd, .sh on Unix/bash). Report any format or lint errors found as part of your review findings.
